summary: Tested new game analytics, grade settings, question regeneration, and student stats features. All 12 backend API tests passed. Fixed a bug in GamesCreator.js where 'content' was referenced instead of 'lessonContent' for storing original content for question regeneration.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: GamesCreator.js line 602 referenced undefined 'content' variable instead of 'lessonContent' - this would have caused the original_content to be undefined when saving games, breaking question regeneration feature

success_rate.frontend: N/A - Unable to test UI due to authentication cookie issues in Playwright

context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints for game analytics, grade settings, question regeneration, and student stats are working correctly. Frontend UI code review shows grade settings toggle and options are properly implemented. The bug fix for 'content' -> 'lessonContent' should be verified in the UI.

details: Each game in game_stats has: game_id, title, game_type, play_count, unique_players, avg_score, best_score
Supports all grade methods: first, best, average
Settings include: count_as_grade, grade_points, grade_method, class_id, assignment_name
Returns questions array and regenerated flag
Returns: game_id, game_title, total_unique_players, total_plays, player_stats array
GET /api/games returns games with count_as_grade, grade_points, grade_method fields

features: 'Contar como Calificación' toggle visible when game is generated
Grade settings options: Puntos Totales, Método (first/best/average), Clase, Nombre de Asignación
Settings expand when toggle is enabled
Calls regenerate-questions endpoint when starting game
Updates game questions if regeneration successful
Falls back to existing questions if regeneration fails

content_variable_bug.impact: Without this fix, original_content would be undefined when saving games, breaking the question regeneration feature
